name: small business HR managers using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees tool
description: For small business HR managers using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees, manual tax filing causes late tax submissions. We automate tax filings and onboarding instead of manual payroll processing and onboarding.
target_audience: small business HR managers using Gusto for payroll processing 5–15 employees
problem_solved: Manual tax filing and onboarding processes are time-consuming and error-prone.
